parameters.query: SELECT c.id, c.title, c.case_number, c.court_date, c.court_name, u.name as assignee_name, u.email as assignee_email FROM "Case" c JOIN "CaseAssignment" ca ON c.id = ca."caseId" JOIN "User" u ON ca."userId" = u.id WHERE c.court_date BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '3 days' AND c.status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'ARCHIVED')

parameters.subject: =תזכורת: דיון ב-{{$json["court_name"] || 'בית משפט'}} — {{$json["title"]}}
